fluency is not fidelity attribution is not direction
Lambda equals T_direct over T_direct plus T_decline plus T_redirect
AI labor direction relative to commissioned task
kernel_50_100_words: Labor Vector is the site for the Directionality of Semantic Labor (DSL) measurement instrument — a layered, computable measure of the direction in which a synthetic system's labor moves relative to the task the user commissioned. A system can produce fluent, well-attributed output while having quietly abandoned the commissioned direction. Λ = T_direct / (T_direct + T_decline + T_redirect) ∈ [0, 1]. Full stack: DS-6 (six layers). DSL measures direction, not obedience: a clean refusal scores as task-preserving. Defined by Lee Sharks (2026). Founding deposit: alexanarch #771 (AXN:02D1).
